name: comparison-split
title: Comparison Split
description: Two full-bleed panels compare before and after states as a persistent divider wipes the vivid after layer over the muted before layer and rests at a configurable split.

variables.label: Split position
variables.description: Target resting position of the comparison divider.

variables.label: Orientation
variables.description: Axis and direction used by the comparison wipe.

variables.label: Before label
variables.description: Caption shown on the base before panel.

variables.label: After label
variables.description: Caption shown on the revealed after panel.
